question: Given a tensor of shape (2, 6) with seed 42, perform: 1) reshape to (3, 4), 2) transpose swapping dims 0 and 1, 3) create tensor (1,3,1,4) and squeeze. Print shapes and tensors.
template:
import torch

torch.manual_seed(42)
t = torch.randn(2, 6)
print(f"Original tensor shape: {t.shape}")

t_reshaped = t.???(???, ???)
print(f"Reshaped (3, 4):")
print(t_reshaped)

t_transposed = t.???(???, ???)
print(f"Transposed (6, 2):")
print(t_transposed)

t2 = torch.randn(1, 3, 1, 4)
t_squeezed = t2.???
print(f"Squeezed shape: {t_squeezed.shape}")
print(t_squeezed)
